query: SHOW COLUMNS FROM services WHERE Field LIKE '%plan%' OR Field LIKE '%Plan%' OR Field LIKE '%product%' OR Field LIKE '%Product%' OR Field LIKE '%retail%' OR Field LIKE '%Retail%' OR Field LIKE '%cost%' OR Field LIKE '%Cost%';
